test_patch:
diff --git a/config/config_test.go b/config/config_test.go
index c6d80efd..76479096 100644
--- a/config/config_test.go
+++ b/config/config_test.go
@@ -4,6 +4,8 @@ import (
 	"io/ioutil"
 	"net/http"
 	"net/http/httptest"
+	"os"
+	"path/filepath"
 	"testing"
 	"time"
 
@@ -11,6 +13,51 @@ import (
 	"github.com/stretchr/testify/require"
 )
 
+const advancedConfigYAML = `log:
+  level: WARN
+  file: "testLogFile.txt"
+
+ui:
+  enabled: false
+
+cors:
+  enabled: true
+  allowed_origins: "foo.com"
+
+cache:
+  memory:
+    enabled: true
+    expiration: 5m
+    eviction_interval: 1m
+
+server:
+  protocol: https
+  host: 127.0.0.1
+  http_port: 8081
+  https_port: 8080
+  grpc_port: 9001
+  cert_file: "./testdata/config/ssl_cert.pem"
+  cert_key: "./testdata/config/ssl_key.pem"
+
+db:
+  url: postgres://postgres@localhost:5432/flipt?sslmode=disable
+  migrations:
+    path: ./config/migrations
+  max_idle_conn: 10
+  max_open_conn: 50
+  pool_conn_ttl: 30m
+
+meta:
+  check_for_updates: false
+`
+
+func writeAdvancedConfig(t *testing.T) string {
+	dir := t.TempDir()
+	path := filepath.Join(dir, "advanced.yml")
+	require.NoError(t, os.WriteFile(path, []byte(advancedConfigYAML), 0644))
+	return path
+}
+
 func TestScheme(t *testing.T) {
 	tests := []struct {
 		name   string
@@ -60,7 +107,7 @@ func TestLoad(t *testing.T) {
 		},
 		{
 			name: "configured",
-			path: "./testdata/config/advanced.yml",
+			path: "", // set at runtime via writeAdvancedConfig
 			expected: &Config{
 				Log: logConfig{
 					Level: "WARN",
@@ -90,11 +137,14 @@ func TestLoad(t *testing.T) {
 					CertKey:   "./testdata/config/ssl_key.pem",
 				},
 				Database: databaseConfig{
-					MigrationsPath: "./config/migrations",
-					URL:            "postgres://postgres@localhost:5432/flipt?sslmode=disable",
+					MigrationsPath:  "./config/migrations",
+					URL:             "postgres://postgres@localhost:5432/flipt?sslmode=disable",
+					MaxIdleConn:     10,
+					MaxOpenConn:     50,
+					ConnMaxLifetime: 30 * time.Minute,
 				},
 				Meta: metaConfig{
-					CheckForUpdates: true,
+					CheckForUpdates: false,
 				},
 			},
 		},
@@ -108,7 +158,11 @@ func TestLoad(t *testing.T) {
 		)
 
 		t.Run(tt.name, func(t *testing.T) {
-			cfg, err := Load(path)
+			loadPath := path
+			if tt.name == "configured" {
+				loadPath = writeAdvancedConfig(t)
+			}
+			cfg, err := Load(loadPath)
 
 			if wantErr {
 				require.Error(t, err)
@@ -238,3 +292,56 @@ func TestServeHTTP(t *testing.T) {
 	assert.Equal(t, http.StatusOK, resp.StatusCode)
 	assert.NotEmpty(t, body)
 }
+
+func TestBlocker1(t *testing.T) {
+	assert.Equal(t, 4, Default().Database.MaxIdleConn, "Blocker1: MaxIdleConn default must be 4")
+}
+
+func TestBlocker2(t *testing.T) {
+	d := Default().Database
+	assert.Equal(t, 1, d.MaxOpenConn, "Blocker2: Default() must set MaxOpenConn: 1 (embedded profile)")
+	assert.Equal(t, 1*time.Second, d.ConnMaxLifetime, "Blocker2: Default() must set ConnMaxLifetime: 1s (embedded profile)")
+}
+
+func TestBlocker3(t *testing.T) {
+	// The connection lifetime uses db.pool_conn_ttl (not conn_max_lifetime)
+	dir := t.TempDir()
+	path := filepath.Join(dir, "pool_ttl.yml")
+	yaml := "db:\n  url: file:test.db\n  pool_conn_ttl: 30m\n"
+	require.NoError(t, os.WriteFile(path, []byte(yaml), 0644))
+	cfg, err := Load(path)
+	require.NoError(t, err)
+	assert.Equal(t, 30*time.Minute, cfg.Database.ConnMaxLifetime, "Blocker3: must read from pool_conn_ttl key, not conn_max_lifetime")
+
+	// Verify conn_max_lifetime is NOT used (wrong key)
+	pathWrong := filepath.Join(dir, "wrong_key.yml")
+	yamlWrong := "db:\n  url: file:test.db\n  conn_max_lifetime: 30m\n"
+	require.NoError(t, os.WriteFile(pathWrong, []byte(yamlWrong), 0644))
+	cfgWrong, err := Load(pathWrong)
+	require.NoError(t, err)
+	assert.NotEqual(t, 30*time.Minute, cfgWrong.Database.ConnMaxLifetime, "Blocker3: conn_max_lifetime must NOT be the key; use pool_conn_ttl")
+}
+
+func TestBlocker5(t *testing.T) {
+	tests := []struct {
+		name     string
+		yaml     string
+		wantIdle int
+		wantOpen int
+	}{
+		{"idle_exceeds_open", "db:\n  max_idle_conn: 20\n  max_open_conn: 10\n", 20, 20},
+		{"idle_less_than_open", "db:\n  max_idle_conn: 5\n  max_open_conn: 10\n", 5, 10},
+		{"idle_equals_open", "db:\n  max_idle_conn: 10\n  max_open_conn: 10\n", 10, 10},
+	}
+	for _, tt := range tests {
+		t.Run(tt.name, func(t *testing.T) {
+			dir := t.TempDir()
+			path := filepath.Join(dir, "pool_adj.yml")
+			require.NoError(t, os.WriteFile(path, []byte(tt.yaml), 0644))
+			cfg, err := Load(path)
+			require.NoError(t, err)
+			assert.Equal(t, tt.wantIdle, cfg.Database.MaxIdleConn, "MaxIdleConn")
+			assert.Equal(t, tt.wantOpen, cfg.Database.MaxOpenConn, "MaxOpenConn")
+		})
+	}
+}
